###############################################################################
#  KEYBINDINGS — ohmychadwm
#  Source: ~/.config/ohmychadwm/chadwm/config.h + ~/.config/ohmychadwm/sxhkd/sxhkdrc
#  Generated: 2026.06.01 by /kiro-create-keybindings — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND
###############################################################################

── 1. Applications & Launchers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + Return            alacritty (terminal)
  super + t                 alacritty (terminal)
  super + KP_Enter          alacritty (terminal)
  F12                       alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + Return       alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + t            alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + End          alacritty -e btop (system monitor)
  super + shift + Return    thunar (file manager)
  super + shift + KP_Enter  thunar (file manager)
  super + F8                thunar (file manager)
  super + space             rofi drun (app launcher)
  super + d                 rofi drun (app launcher)
  super + r                 rofi drun (app launcher)
  super + F11               rofi drun (fullscreen launcher)
  super + F12               rofi drun (app launcher)
  super + shift + d         dmenu_run
  super + alt + space       ohmychadwm menu
  super + e                 code (VSCode)
  super + F2                code (VSCode)
  super + F1                vivaldi-stable (browser)
  ctrl + alt + v            vivaldi-stable (browser)
  ctrl + alt + f            firefox (browser)
  ctrl + alt + b            brave (browser)
  ctrl + alt + c            chromium (browser)
  ctrl + alt + g            chromium (browser)
  ctrl + alt + o            opera (browser)
  super + F3                inkscape
  super + F4                gimp
  super + F5                meld
  super + F6                vlc --video-on-top
  super + F7                virtualbox
  super + F9                lollypop (music)
  super + F10               spotify
  ctrl + alt + s            spotify
  super + v                 pavucontrol (audio mixer)
  ctrl + alt + u            pavucontrol (audio mixer)
  ctrl + alt + d            obs
  ctrl + alt + e            archlinux-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + a            alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + q            alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + p            pamac-manager
  ctrl + alt + m            mintstick -m iso (USB writer)
  ctrl + alt + ,            mintstick -m iso (USB writer)
  ctrl + shift + Escape     xfce4-taskmanager
  alt + F2                  xfce4-appfinder --collapsed
  alt + F3                  xfce4-appfinder
  alt + r                   rofi-theme-selector
  alt + t                   variety -t (trash wallpaper)
  alt + n                   variety -n (next wallpaper)
  alt + p                   variety -p (previous wallpaper)
  alt + f                   variety -f (favorite wallpaper)
  alt + Left                variety -p (previous wallpaper)
  alt + Right               variety -n (next wallpaper)
  alt + Up                  variety --toggle-pause
  alt + Down                variety --resume
  super + ctrl + space      variety --selector (wallpaper picker)
  alt + shift + t           variety -t + pywal
  alt + shift + n           variety -n + pywal
  alt + shift + p           variety -p + pywal
  alt + shift + f           variety -f + pywal
  alt + shift + u           wal -i (update colors from wallpaper)

── 2. Window Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + q                 close focused window
  super + shift + q         close focused window
  super + shift + c         close focused window
  super + ctrl + q          close all windows (killall)
  ctrl + alt + Delete       close all windows (killall)
  super + f                 toggle fullscreen
  super + ctrl + shift + Return  zoom focused window to master
  super + shift + j         move window down the stack
  super + shift + k         move window up the stack
  super + ctrl + j          rotate stack forward
  super + ctrl + k          rotate stack backward
  super + alt + o           increase window opacity
  super + alt + shift + o   decrease window opacity

── 3. Workspaces / Tags / Groups ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + 1..9              switch to workspace 1–9 (azerty number row)
  super + ctrl + 1..9       toggle workspace 1–9 visibility
  super + shift + 1..9      send window to workspace 1–9
  super + ctrl + shift + 1..9   toggle window's tag for workspace 1–9
  super + agrave            view all workspaces
  super + shift + agrave    send window to all workspaces
  super + Tab               view previous workspace
  super + Left              view previous workspace
  super + Right             view next workspace

── 4. Layout & Tiling ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + ctrl + F1         layout: dwindle
  super + ctrl + F2         layout: tile
  super + ctrl + F3         layout: spiral
  super + ctrl + F4         layout: deck
  super + ctrl + F5         layout: bottom stack
  super + ctrl + F6         layout: bottom stack horizontal
  super + ctrl + F7         layout: grid
  super + ctrl + F8         layout: nrow grid
  super + ctrl + F9         layout: horizontal grid
  super + ctrl + F10        layout: gapless grid
  super + ctrl + F11        layout: centered master
  super + ctrl + F12        layout: centered floating master
  super + ctrl + m          cycle to next layout
  super + ctrl + p          cycle to previous layout
  super + h                 shrink master area
  super + l                 grow master area
  super + shift + h         grow focused window (cfact)
  super + shift + l         shrink focused window (cfact)
  super + shift + o         reset focused window size (cfact)
  super + i                 increase master window count
  super + n                 decrease master window count
  super + ctrl + w          toggle tab mode
  super + ctrl + t          toggle gaps
  super + ctrl + i          increase all gaps
  super + ctrl + d          decrease all gaps
  super + shift + i         increase inner gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + i  decrease inner gaps
  super + ctrl + o          increase outer gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + o  decrease outer gaps
  super + ctrl + section    increase inner horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + section   decrease inner horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + egrave     increase inner vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + egrave    decrease inner vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + exclam     increase outer horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + exclam    decrease outer horizontal gaps
  super + ctrl + ccedilla   increase outer vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + ccedilla  decrease outer vertical gaps
  super + ctrl + shift + d  reset gaps to default
  super + shift + minus     decrease window border width
  super + shift + p         increase window border width
  super + shift + w         reset window border width

── 5. Multi-monitor ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + comma             focus previous monitor
  super + semicolon         focus next monitor
  super + shift + Left      move window to previous monitor
  super + shift + Right     move window to next monitor

── 6. Multimedia & Hardware ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  XF86AudioRaiseVolume      pamixer -i 10 (volume up)
  XF86AudioLowerVolume      pamixer -d 10 (volume down)
  XF86AudioMute             pamixer -t (toggle mute)
  XF86AudioPlay             playerctl play-pause
  XF86AudioNext             playerctl next
  XF86AudioPrev             playerctl previous
  XF86AudioStop             playerctl stop
  XF86MonBrightnessUp       xbacklight -inc 10
  XF86MonBrightnessDown     xbacklight -dec 10

── 7. Screenshots ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Print                     scrot full screen to Pictures
  super + u                 maim region to clipboard
  super + ctrl + u          maim full screen to clipboard
  ctrl + Print              xfce4-screenshooter
  ctrl + shift + Print      gnome-screenshot -i
  ctrl + super + Print      flameshot gui

── 8. System & Session ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + x                 archlinux-logout
  ctrl + alt + k            archlinux-logout
  ctrl + alt + l            archlinux-logout
  super + shift + x         edu-powermenu
  super + Escape            ohmychadwm menu (logout/lock/restart)
  alt + x                   ohmychadwm menu (system)
  alt + shift + x           ohmychadwm menu (system)
  super + k                 kiro-keybindings (show this reference)
  super + b                 toggle bar
  super + shift + space     toggle bar
  super + g                 toggle fastcompmgr compositor
  super + p                 toggle picom compositor
  super + shift + s         reload sxhkd
  super + shift + r         restart chadwm
  super + ctrl + shift + r  rebuild chadwm (rebuild.sh)
  super + shift + Escape    xkill
  ctrl + alt + shift + Delete   quit chadwm
  ctrl + alt + shift + F1   update-system
  super + ctrl + shift + F1     update-system
